changelog:
v1.1.7 (2026-05-12)

[Emergency] Add manual rescue updater for machines where the app exits before showing the update banner.
[Updater] Harden in-app update: .part download, EXE size validation, PID wait, and update log.
[Render] Include manual image mode and smoother image motion.
[Subtitles] Include text case and soft subtitle styling controls.
